meta.title: About us
meta.description: Pepe Dome is a venue for contemporary circus, cultural exchange and artistic education in Munich's Ostpark.

hero.title: About Pepe Dome
hero.subtitle: Pepe Dome is where circus arts and culture intersect. A place that makes performance accessible to people of every age and background.

story.title: Our story
story.text: The search for a space for contemporary circus began in 2006. Across several temporary venues (MUCCA, CircusHub, Sugar Mountain) the project grew until its official opening on 1 August 2025 in Munich's Ostpark. The geodesic dome with 8.5 m ceiling provides excellent acoustics and step-free access for spectacular shows and rigorous training.

background.title: Background & project idea
background.p1: Pepe Dome is a geodesic dome with around 200 seats. Since August 2025 it serves as a stage, training space and cultural venue in Munich's Ostpark.
background.p2: Before that, the Lunatico Theatre tent stood temporarily on the same spot. As part of the Nebourhoods project and the wind-down of Festspielhaus GmbH, the dome was handed over to us.
background.p3: We reactivated it as a venue for contemporary circus and cultural formats, with the goal of creating a permanent cultural home in the Neuperlach neighbourhood. Talks are ongoing to integrate the dome into local urban development plans.
background.p4: From 2026 the non-profit Circus Akademie München e.V. takes over operations to pursue artistic, educational and social goals.

areas.title: Our areas
areas.subtitle: Three pillars of Pepe Dome: culture, education and research

items: Festival formats (e.g. Freeman Festival, Zeit für Zirkus, Spiel:Art)

items: Partnerships with neighbourhood management focused on sustainability

ecosystem.title: The PEPE ecosystem
ecosystem.subtitle: Three pillars, one shared goal: to support and showcase circus arts as a contemporary art form.

dome.name: PEPE Dome
dome.description: The geodesic dome in Ostpark is our main stage for shows, festivals and events.

shows.name: PEPE Shows
shows.description: Contemporary circus at the highest level, from intimate cabarets to large productions.

arts.name: pepe Arts
arts.description: Artistic development and production with residencies, workshops and creative collaboration.

network.title: Network & engagement
network.text: As an active part of the cultural scene we engage in various networks to promote the visibility and professionalisation of circus arts.

values.title: Our values
values.subtitle: These principles guide our work and shape everything we do.

items.title: Artistic excellence
items.description: We aim for the highest quality in shows and training and champion circus arts as a contemporary art form.

items.title: Inclusion & community
items.description: Everyone is welcome, whatever their background or experience. Culture for all.

items.title: Sustainability
items.description: We reuse materials rather than buying new. Ecological responsibility matters to us.

items.title: Innovation
items.description: We experiment with new formats and technologies to reimagine circus.

team.title: The team
team.description: Behind Pepe Dome stands the PepeCollective, a committed network of artists, cultural workers and organisers with more than 15 years of experience.

location.title: Visit us at the Dome
location.text: Pepe Dome sits in the lovely Ostpark in Munich. It's easy to reach by public transport, with parking nearby.

vision.title: Vision
vision.text: Pepe Dome is becoming a long-term, vibrant place for contemporary circus, cultural exchange, artistic education, community programs and publicly accessible events.

mission.title: Mission
mission.text: Promoting contemporary circus and cultural participation in Munich, paired with inclusive training and education. Cultural focus: Ostpark.

meta.title: Workshops & Training | Pepe Dome Munich
meta.description: Spring 2026 course program: aerial arts, aerial silks, straps, vertical fabric, circus arts, conditioning and more. Classes for kids, teens and adults at Pepe Dome Munich.

hero.title: Workshops & Training
hero.subtitle: Contemporary circus and artistry at Pepe Dome, for every level

booking.title: How to book a class
booking.text: Our classes run on two platforms, depending on which class you want to join.
booking.eversportsText: Capoeira, kids' acrobatics, Urban Acrobatics, Cyr Wheel and Flow Arts are booked via Eversports. Trial class, single session or pass: you'll see live availability in the calendar below. Dropping in works too, just pay cash on site.
booking.aircroText: The aerial classes on Mondays and Wednesdays are run by our partner Aircrobatic Studios. Book directly with them, not via Eversports.
booking.partnerText: We are working on letting you join our classes with a Wellpass or Urban Sports Club membership soon.

intro.title: Professional training in a unique atmosphere
intro.text: Structured weekly classes for kids, teens and adults, from first handstands to advanced aerial work. Our geodesic dome with its 8.5 m ceiling gives you plenty of room.

schedule.title: All classes at a glance
schedule.text: Click a class for details. Booking happens in the section below.
schedule.trickingNoteB: Tricking & breaking planned, dates to follow.
schedule.dropInNoteB: You can currently join any class spontaneously and pay in cash on site. We prefer bookings via Eversports though, so we know in advance who's coming.

specials.title: Special offers
specials.subtitle: Open pro training, outside the weekly schedule.

pro.title: Professional Training
pro.subtitle: Daytime · open training for Munich's pro artists
pro.text: Supported by the Munich Department of Arts and Culture. Current times and updates are shared in a WhatsApp group. Request access via the contact form, subject "Profitraining".

disciplines.title: Our disciplines
disciplines.subtitle: The breadth of contemporary circus arts, from aerial work to floor.

items.name: Aerial Arts
items.description: Vertical fabric, trapeze, aerial hoop, straps, Spanish web

items.name: Ground Arts
items.description: Handstand, acrobatics, contortion, Cyr wheel, juggling

location.title: A unique venue
location.ceilingText: Ideal conditions for aerial work of all kinds.
location.acousticsText: The geodesic dome shape provides excellent sound distribution.
location.parkText: Training in the green, right inside Munich's Ostpark.
